revision.comment: add has= parameter to allow merge of parameter 1= in Template:Wikisourcehas. See TFD outcome.
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = wikisource | text = [[Wikisource]] has {{{has|original text related to this article}}}:
'''{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}[[{{#if:{{{old|}}}|old}}wikisource:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{display|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}'''
}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Wikisource]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = wikisource | text = [[Wikisource]] has {{{has|original text related to this article}}}:
'''{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}[[{{#if:{{{old|}}}|old}}wikisource:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{display|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}'''
}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] [[en:Wikisource]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = wikisource | text = [[Wikisource]] has {{{has|original text related to this article}}}:
'''{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}[[{{#if:{{{old|}}}|old}}wikisource:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{display|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}'''
}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Wikisource]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = wikisource | text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has {{{has|original text related to this article}}}:
'''{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}[[{{#if:{{{old|}}}|old}}wikisource:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{display|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}'''
}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = wikisource | text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has {{{has|original text related to this article}}}:
'''{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}[[{{#if:{{{old|}}}|old}}wikisource:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{display|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq: {{{italics}}} | yes | '' | }}'''
